notes: Findings are candidates. Dynamic imports, string-based registries and external package consumers can require manual review.
Package src/index.ts files are treated as entrypoints for file-level analysis.
Strict mode keeps file-level candidates and non-exported top-level declarations with no references.

retainedUnusedFiles.reason: No static import or re-export from the analyzed TypeScript graph
retainedUnusedFiles.retainedReason: Strict owner for Quake-2-master/server/sv_null.c; intentionally retained even when the full-server host uses host.ts adapters.
